narrative:
Indian Hill Ex Vill Sd (Hamilton) exempted village school district has 11,384 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
